{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032301170515E1CE2F5AE26E5554A9"}"},"total":4454},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7048698656928678693","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好评！此评价虽然才两个字，但语法严谨，用词工整，结构巧妙，朗朗上口，可见言简意赅，再加上以感叹号收尾，实在是点睛之笔，妙笔生花，意境深远，照应前文升华主题。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1641153072,"group_id":"6968853989404183582","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzSQauWswL17idKYVyLH9Lo=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f08588ab2d2649c8b7dea4479748141c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776797101&x-signature=xmfZpCuErewJpatKDwcqJPBdZmA%3D","user_id":"967206407774008","user_name":"过月亮"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"967206407774008","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6968853989404183582","book_info":{"abstract":"【武侠+剑道+权谋+腹黑+搞笑+多主角】天下大势为棋盘，世间众生为棋子，一人执黑，一人执白。有人目生重瞳，冷眼看向凡俗众生，抬手间天地颠覆。有人温文儒雅，算计一环紧扣一环。有人以二品之姿一步入脉，一步不惑，引十数颗天外陨星燃放烟火。有人剑道刚正，却侠客独行......有人痛极大哭，有人畅怀大笑。有一腰佩木剑的少年从世外桃源走出，看这俗世，看那江湖。

叶落忽知秋意，蝉声且送阳西。

你好，仙侠!","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/01c1776281c655840dac6eead5a9dfd2","author":"雨落竹冷","author_id":"","book_id":"6968853989404183582","book_name":"蝉声且送阳西","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0e0e8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":92,"name":"腹黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=92&name=腹黑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":16,"name":"武侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=16&name=武侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":9,"name":"仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9&name=仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6968854475637260830","read_count":"16356","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2647073"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"1096","tags":"东方仙侠,奇幻仙侠,仙侠,玄幻,武侠,腹黑,搞笑轻松,群像","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/95ab636060b570ea6544fdec7ed1d346~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779383825&x-signature=8LnBSCZU8MKVP3lnQrTvBMfhOfM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2111523583958296","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5.6966807e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032301170515E1CE2F5AE26E5554A9"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读16小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":23,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":56966,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":23164},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1641153163,"author_reply_time":1641153168,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7053992763985396492","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好书啊，有点爱不释手。节奏正好，文笔严谨却不失风默（风趣幽默的意思，缺一不可）。瑕疵也有，标点符号出错，语句不通顺（也可能是我小学毕业的原因🙈）。为什么说好书？现在番茄讲“神作”“爽文“小白文””，这本恰好在神作与爽文之间，难得。为什么难得？神作看之，心悦，久看伤神，一板一眼，节奏拖沓，费时费力。爽文看之，成瘾，又感浮夸至极，不愿做那浮夸之人。开局是好的，等我看完再来补评，强推，作者功底很好，加油。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1642385680,"group_id":"6968853989404183582","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"不谈亏欠，不负遇见","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N58fGqMzT2dkUAMS6jaFh3I=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/952b726a67904a9689c8526186f60966~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789841&x-signature=g5mrzP9pUSER9pyyLtvNLgPOC0g%3D","user_id":"104503461896","user_name":"河之雎鸠"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"104503461896","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6968853989404183582","book_info":{"abstract":"【武侠+剑道+权谋+腹黑+搞笑+多主角】天下大势为棋盘，世间众生为棋子，一人执黑，一人执白。有人目生重瞳，冷眼看向凡俗众生，抬手间天地颠覆。有人温文儒雅，算计一环紧扣一环。有人以二品之姿一步入脉，一步不惑，引十数颗天外陨星燃放烟火。有人剑道刚正，却侠客独行......有人痛极大哭，有人畅怀大笑。有一腰佩木剑的少年从世外桃源走出，看这俗世，看那江湖。

叶落忽知秋意，蝉声且送阳西。
